Selection icon + square title bars.

### Fixed
- The **selected playlist's icon** now switches to auto-contrast too (it stayed light and vanished on a bright accent).
- **All title bars are square** now — the list header and main-view panels were rounded (`7px`); buttons stay rounded.

### Important — clear the skin cache
MediaMonkey caches compiled skins. Delete `%APPDATA%\MediaMonkey5\precompiledLess_Flat Monkey Dark_Desktop.css`, then restart MediaMonkey.
